chapter_title.en: Chapter on the First and Final Departure From Mina

text: 3018 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «لِمَنِ اِتَّقَى اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3018 - In a narration from Ali ibn Atiyyah, from his father, from Abu Ja'far (as), he said:
"For the one who fears Allah (swt), the Mighty and Glorious."
